message:
fix: remove stale State assignment in jiraToTrackerIssue

Line 189 assigned ti.State to a *StatusField pointer instead of a string.
When Priority was non-nil but Status was nil, StatusToBeads() would receive
a struct pointer rather than the expected string, causing incorrect mapping.
The correct string assignment on line 194 handles all cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
